Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class ConversationEntry

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.ConversationEntry
public class ConversationEntry extends SObject

Java class for ConversationEntry complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ConversationEntry">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="Actor" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ActorId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ActorName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ActorType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AttachedContentDocuments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ClientDuration" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ClientTimestamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CombinedAttachments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContentDocumentLinks" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Conversation" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ConversationEntityId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ConversationId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EntryEndTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EntryTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EntryTimeMilliSecs" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EntryType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="HasAttachments" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Message" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MessageDeliverTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MessageIdentifier" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MessageReadTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MessageSendTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MessageStatus" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MessageStatusCode" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Seq" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ServerReceivedTimestamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
